name: Gold Payal Anklet
description: A classic Indian payal reinterpreted with a cleaner, more minimal silhouette. Fine 22kt gold links interspersed with tiny bells that chime softly. Available as a single piece or matching pair. A timeless addition to festive and wedding attire.
careInstructions: Avoid wearing in water. Store separately from other jewellery to prevent tangling.
shipping: Ships within 3–5 business days. Free shipping on orders above ₹1000.
returns: Returns accepted within 7 days in original, unworn condition with intact packaging.
